root_cause.description: Snake_case taxonomy ID from the classification rules (e.g. rosa_provisioning_failure, release_quay_auth, unknown)

category.description: Category from taxonomy: infrastructure, test_flake, or unknown

component.description: Component identifier from metadata.json (e.g. tsf-cli, tssc-cli, tssc-test)

failed_task.description: Name of the failed Tekton task (e.g. run-tsf-e2e, provision-rosa)

failed_step.description: Name of the failed step within the task

completion_time.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of pipelinerun completion (from metadata.json)

test_name.description: Ginkgo test name that failed, or N/A if not a test failure

error_message.description: One-line error message describing the failure

evidence.description: 5-15 key log lines that led to the classification

details.description: 1-3 sentences explaining what happened and why it was classified this way

suggested_action.description: 1-2 sentences on what to investigate or fix
